cases.name: Autonomous pricing stays bounded by explicit authority envelopes
cases.notes: The autonomous pricing decision references underwriting, reputation, capital, and web3 evidence while staying inside signed authority ceilings.

cases.name: Capital-pool optimization remains simulation-backed and override-ready
cases.notes: Optimization recommendations remain currency-safe, scenario-comparable, and operator-reviewable.

cases.name: Automatic bind execution remains interruptible and rollback-safe
cases.notes: Execution emits safety gates and rollback controls while comparison evidence preserves operator override review.

cases.name: Critical drift triggers fail-safe rollback without hidden widening
cases.notes: Critical settlement drift engages the delegated-only safe state and cancels pending automated execution.
